query:
-- Manual contacts WITH emails linked to hot/warm active projects — worth keeping
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) as contactCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as projectCount
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.enrichmentSource = 'manual' 
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
  AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != ''
  AND p.suppressed = false
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY p.priority;

-- Manual contacts WITH emails linked to hot/warm active projects — worth keeping
SELECT 
  p.priority,
  COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) as contactCount,
  COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) as projectCount
FROM contacts c
INNER JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id
INNER JOIN projects p ON p.id = cp.projectId
WHERE c.enrichmentSource = 'manual' 
  AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified'
  AND c.email IS NOT NULL AND c.email != ''
  AND p.suppressed = false
  AND p.lifecycleStatus = 'active'
GROUP BY p.priority;
